question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $72,000 on April 21?

fragility_points: Short-horizon BTC volatility can erase a 2-3% cushion quickly.

The view depends more on regime persistence than on any deterministic catalyst.

Adjust a bullish spot-level read downward because exact-minute-close contracts are narrower than touch or broad trend bets.

unresolved_ambiguities: Exact BTC level at Apr 21 noon ET remains unknown.
No direct settlement proof exists yet because the relevant candle has not occurred.
payload.what_would_change_view: I would move up if BTC keeps holding comfortably above 72000 into Apr 20-21, and move down materially if Binance BTC/USDT breaks back below 72000 or contract-timestamp ambiguity appears.
